Class FactsArray

java.lang.Object
FactsArray
public class FactsArray extends Object
Class to mannage an array of Facts objects and provide functionality

    Field

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    String
    add(String k, String p, double c)
    checks if the given fact is already in the array, calls the update method if it is already in the array or adds it to the array if it is not.
    int
    exists(String k)
    Searches for a Fact in the array that has the same key as the one given and returns true or false based on if it is or is not found
    String
    search(String k)
    Searches for a Fact in the array that has the same key as the one given and return it as a string
    String
    searchBySentence(String k, String s)
    Searches for a Fact in the array that has the same key and factual statement as the one given and return it as a string
    boolean
    setArray(String name)
    Class takes in a file name and reads the file into the array and returns a boolean to indicate if the file was read in successfully
    boolean
    update(String k, String p, double c)
    Finds a fact that matches the key of the given one, and changes the fact and confidence score if the confidence score is bigger than or equal to the previous one.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • knowledge

      public Facts[] knowledge

    • fileName

      public String fileName

      public int count

    • current

      public Facts current

  • Method Details

    • setArray

      public boolean setArray(String name) throws IOException
      Class takes in a file name and reads the file into the array and returns a boolean to indicate if the file was read in successfully
      Throws:
      IOException

    • search

      public String search(String k)
      Searches for a Fact in the array that has the same key as the one given and return it as a string

    • searchBySentence

      public String searchBySentence(String k, String s)
      Searches for a Fact in the array that has the same key and factual statement as the one given and return it as a string

    • exists

      public int exists(String k)
      Searches for a Fact in the array that has the same key as the one given and returns true or false based on if it is or is not found

    • update

      public boolean update(String k, String p, double c)
      Finds a fact that matches the key of the given one, and changes the fact and confidence score if the confidence score is bigger than or equal to the previous one. returns a boolean to indicate if it was sucessfully updated

    • add

      public String add(String k, String p, double c)
      checks if the given fact is already in the array, calls the update method if it is already in the array or adds it to the array if it is not. Returns a string indicating if the statement was added, updated or neither.
